item.title: Trans Rights Are Human Rights
item.description:
Iowa right now
If the smallest group of marginalized individuals' rights are not safe, then none of our rights are safe. Currently live streams while they are still up: https://www.youtube.com/live/XHs32SseSUo?si=EN7G898wAUAagRza Outcome: https://www.nytimes.com/2025/02/27/us/iowa-transgender-civil-rights-bill.html :(
item.dc:creator: LavenderRainn

item.title: People need to understand how the system actually works
item.description: Link explaining how immigrants are actually funding social security https://www.nytimes.com/2025/01/13/business/social-security-undocumented-immigrants.html
item.dc:creator: sureasyourebornyourenevergoingtoseenounicorn

item.title: Aunt Cass - Big Hero 6 Cosplay
item.description:
Before it happens again in the comments, yes, this is an insanely simple cosplay... That doesn't mean I put in no effort, for me it's all the small details and the vibe of the character. Despite that, this utterly blew up on Reddit yesterday to the point where old friends reached out to me to tell me they saw me on their feed... So either I nailed this cosplay despite it's simplicity, or... you all just have a thing for this character and I stumbled across something I was not prepared for :P
Reference
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.dc:creator: Xalten2

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Trying to do more daily dirty posts dis week to catch up on my over 3k memes I have piled up to share. enjoy!
how about I just be a menace to just you? as a lil treat?
I am awesome.
om this definitely feels like I have it saved more times then I thought.
I already ate today. y am I hungry. again. is this like a never ending cycle with this human body thing.
¬_¬
exactly what would happen to my pale skin.
I would.
I am paying attention to both.
oh is that why you tease me?
it is cute tho.
teehee
love Little Britain.
unicorn blankie please. and stuffie.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We had a super successful little secret santa! Thank you to everyone who participated. I learned a lot and look forward to doing it next year! We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "Happiness is a byproduct of an effort to make someone else happy." -Gretta Brooker Palmer "The creative power stirring in me needs recognition. Looking deeply into another person, listening intently to the stirring will elicit joy. I will feel in touch with my own creative power, a lasting thrill, not a fleeting moment of happiness." I always have looked at my meme sharing as putting good into the world. Since its something smol I can do that others enjoy. By extension I look at the community I have build in discord as a creative and learning endeavor. I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe

item.title: He knows the cost of everything and the value of nothing.
item.description: In case you haven't heard: https://www.cnn.com/2025/02/25/politics/us-gold-card-foreigners-trump/index.html
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: What Happened Today #26
item.description: Trump’s radical overhaul rages on as his administration freezes USAID funds, cuts 90% of foreign aid contracts, orders sweeping federal downsizing from EPA to HHS, dismisses hiring bias cases, tests Starlink on a $2 billion Verizon contract, and retools the Washington Post’s opinion section—fueling protests nationwide. #govbrieftoday #resist LINKS 1 - https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-administration-supreme-court-foreign-aid-freeze/ 2 - https://apnews.com/article/trump-usaid-foreign-aid-cuts-6292f48f8d4025bed0bf5c3e9d623c16 3 - https://www.politico.com/news/2025/02/26/trump-epa-spending-cut-00206228 4 - https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/trump-administration-sets-stage-for-large-scale-federal-layoffs 5 - https://news.bloomberglaw.com/us-law-week/white-house-orders-agencies-to-prepare-large-scale-staff-cuts 6 - https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/2025/02/26/federal-agencies-relocate-dc-trump/ 7 - https://www.cnn.com/politics/live-news/trump-administration-news-02-26-25#cm7mdkgje00053b6o9gkm4d9q 8 - https://www.aol.com/rfk-jr-led-cdc-kills-221714667.html? 9 - https://www.usatoday.com/story/life/health-wellness/2025/02/26/first-measles-death-texas-outbreak/80482935007/ 10 - https://www.nytimes.com/live/2025/02/26/us/trump-musk-news/the-justice-dept-moves-to-dismiss-cases-filed-against-police-and-fire-departments-over-hiring-practices?smid=url-share 11 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/technology/faa-tests-starlink-terminals-as-musk-claims-verizon-tech-is-not-working/ar-AA1zLuz9 12 - https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5y44gw5gpro Fighting Back: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/feb/26/usaid-hiv-protest-trump-musk
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.description: Some Police Officers in Germany try to stop a Old Lady from "Omas gegen Rechts" (grandmas against right) on a Bike waving a Antifa Flag, and are met with her Middle Finger while she rolls away.

item.title: Fifth Element Mondoshawan 3d print. One of my all time favorite movies!
item.description:
Still need to paint and age this print to finish it. This was printed in bronze silk PLA. The file was from here - https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:2962875
Not happy with the head. I'll probably reprint it at a different angle to get rid of those layer lines on the forehead and cheeks.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1285 (fantasy for adults)
item.description:
The world, or at least my apartment, smells of sawdust this morning. Let us get this bread.
Cute early horses.
Mood.
My Mask for my Cpap slipped off the hose last night so I slept absolutely wretchedly, and since I had no tape to fix it last night ... thats why my sleep was so bad. Gotta get tape tonight.
We could use more Asari pin-up art.
Female American Redstart
Rock Sandpiper vs Purple Sandpiper.
This is my mood today: work meeting at fucking 7am.
I wish Pippin would wear something like this lol
No kings, no lords.
Dundundun
This is something I've also witnessed Steller's Jays do.
Hey look, it's an air friar.
Seriously, I don't think I could tell these fuckers apart
Fucking Christopher Columbus.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning. Good boy Pippin. I love you too. [Kissing noises] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

Quick shout out to all you dirty little shit-boys out there.
"YES YOU DID!!!" -Sam Jackson

item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: I have too many memes: Dump #86
item.description:
I do stuff like this when someone is in a bad situation and worrying or about to faint and it always feels weird when my sister has badly cut her finger and is trying not to throw up and I’m just like “Hey so why don’t you tell me about that most recent Taylor Swift album?” It works if they’re willing to talk to you about it without knowing why you’re asking but that does not happen often.
I should use this as my background for teams meetings
My ideal form
I’m sorry I’m talking so much during this one
But now it’s a thing
So
…
See the game last night?
…
I didn’t
THE ULTIMATE LIFEFORM WILL BE A CRAB TRAIN Or a goth hedgehog whatever we get to first
OK I’m done now, do the stuff up here aside from perhaps eating a wild strawberry that’s optional
MOTHMAN!!!
item.dc:creator: Sweenerd

item.title: You are not rich because billionaires have taken your fair share of wealth
item.description: The rich are destroying the world and as it crumbles around them will fuck off to their lairs where they believe they will be safe. It is time to disabuse them of that idea.
